title: Apply bounded cache, Docker and trash retention
goal: Add guarded maintenance for user caches, Docker build cache, unused images, Grabowski releases, logs and trash with explicit exclusions for volumes, active builds and pinned recovery state.

approval.note: Source implementation is authorized. Applying cleanup to live caches or Docker requires exact-target dry-run evidence; Docker volumes remain outside generic authorization.

acceptance.assertion: Every maintenance class has a deterministic dry-run report before effects.
Docker volumes and running or referenced images are never included in generic cleanup.
Cache targets and age rules are policy-driven and idempotent.
Each applied cleanup records before and after sizes, exact targets and exclusions.

metadata.source: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1 plan from live 2026-07-14 storage audit
does_not_establish: permission to bypass leases or dirty-state guards
